original_query: SELECT "t5"."ENAME" FROM (SELECT "ENAME", "JOB" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "ENAME", "JOB") AS "t5" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "NAME" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t6" ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."NAME" GROUP BY "t5"."ENAME"

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Removed unnecessary subqueries as they were not contributing to the final result
Eliminated the LEFT JOIN with DEPT table as it was not affecting the result set
Simplified the GROUP BY structure by removing redundant grouping operations
